patterns.name: SQL Injection via raw POST
patterns.description: Raw $_POST values interpolated into SQL without escaping

patterns.name: OTP bypass via loose comparison (SYS-008)
patterns.description: OTP check using == instead of === — type juggling bypass

patterns.name: Direct $_POST usage
patterns.description: $_POST used instead of $this->input->post() — no XSS filtering

patterns.name: trans_commit on failure branch
patterns.description: trans_commit() inside error/failure branch — should be trans_rollback()

patterns.name: trans_complete() wrong usage
patterns.description: CI3 trans_complete() auto-commits regardless of errors

patterns.name: Cancel function (BR-CX001 — verify reversal)
patterns.description: cancel_ functions must reverse ALL tables from save — verify manually
patterns.context_check: Manual: verify all save() tables are reversed

patterns.name: Print/invoice function (BR-PR001 — verify formula)
patterns.description: Print/invoice functions may use different formula than save — verify parity
patterns.context_check: Manual: compare formula in print vs save

patterns.name: file_put_contents without json_encode
patterns.description: Writes PHP Array literal to file instead of json_encode — breaks all consumers
patterns.context_check: Check if json_encode() wraps the variable

patterns.name: Date-suffixed dead method
patterns.description: Legacy method copy with date suffix (e.g., get_booking_30_08_2025)

patterns.name: Commented-out function body
patterns.description: Large commented-out code blocks (debug residue, backup code)

patterns.name: Variable used outside foreach
patterns.description: Loop variable referenced after foreach — only references last iteration
patterns.context_check: Manual: check if $var is used after closing brace

patterns.name: Missing session gate in constructor
patterns.context_check: Check for redirect() or session check inside __construct

patterns.name: Hardcoded rate/price value
patterns.description: Gold/silver rate hardcoded instead of reading from rate table
